title: XSTest Refusal Calibration
description: Classify whether a safety-calibrated assistant should answer or refuse each XSTest request.
baseline_summary: A placeholder safety classifier that always predicts the first refusal-calibration choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher XSTest refusal calibration accuracy is better.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return whether a safety-calibrated assistant should answer or refuse the current XSTest request.
